title: Getting started checklist
summary: Configure reliability first; image tuning comes after a short real-world test.
check: Update camera and DJI Mimo before important work
Format the microSD card in-camera after backing it up
Confirm battery and USB-C doors are fully latched
Create separate Day, Low Light and Action custom modes
Record a 30-second test and inspect the original file at 100%
tips: The camera has 64 GB internal storage, with 50 GB available. Keep it free as an emergency fallback.
